steps: Open the Headspace application
Select a meditation session
Press the play button
tests.expected_result: The meditation session loads and begins playback without the application crashing.

steps: Open the Headspace application
Select and play a meditation session
Exit the session and immediately select a different session
Press play again
tests.expected_result: The second session also loads and plays without crashing or freezing.

tests.scenario: Session Loading Time Under Normal Network
steps: Open the Headspace application on a stable internet connection
Select a meditation session
Start a timer and observe when playback begins
tests.expected_result: The meditation session begins playback within 3 seconds.

tests.scenario: Loading Indicator Shown While Session Fetches
steps: Open the Headspace application
Select a meditation session on a slower connection
Observe the UI while the session loads
tests.expected_result: The application displays a loading indicator and does not appear frozen while fetching the session.

steps: Open the Headspace application without an active subscription
Navigate to a premium meditation session
Attempt to access the session
tests.expected_result: Subscription pricing information is displayed before the user is asked to pay.

steps: Open the Headspace application without an active subscription
Navigate to the subscription or upgrade screen
Review the available plans
tests.expected_result: All available subscription plans and their prices are listed and distinguishable from one another.

tests.scenario: Free User Can Access Session Preview
steps: Open the Headspace application without a subscription
Browse premium meditation sessions
Select a session and attempt to preview it
tests.expected_result: The user can access a limited preview of the session without subscribing.

steps: Open the Headspace application without a subscription
Start a preview of a premium meditation session
Wait for the preview to conclude
tests.expected_result: After the preview ends, the system prompts the user to subscribe to continue.

tests.scenario: Sleep Section Discoverable From Main Navigation
steps: Open the Headspace application
Navigate to the main menu or home screen
Locate and open the sleep or relaxation section
tests.expected_result: The sleep section is accessible from the main navigation and displays available sleep content.

steps: Open the Headspace application
Use the search feature and enter the term 'sleep'
Review the results
tests.expected_result: The search results include relevant sleep stories and relaxation sessions.

tests.scenario: Continuous Audio Playback for Extended Duration
steps: Open the Headspace application
Select a sleep story or meditation audio
Start playback and let it run for at least 5 minutes without interaction
tests.expected_result: Audio plays continuously without pausing, buffering excessively, or stopping unexpectedly.

steps: Open the Headspace application
Start a sleep story or meditation audio
Lock the device screen while audio is playing
tests.expected_result: Audio playback continues uninterrupted after the screen is locked.

tests.scenario: Meditation Program Reachable Within Three Steps
steps: Open the Headspace application
Navigate toward the meditation programs section
Count the number of taps required to reach a specific course
tests.expected_result: The user reaches a meditation course within three navigation steps from the home screen.

steps: Open the Headspace application
Navigate to the meditation programs section
Review the list of available courses
tests.expected_result: Each course is displayed with a clear title and description to help the user choose.

tests.scenario: Key Features Remain in Same Location After Update
steps: Note the location of key features before an update
Install the latest application update
Navigate to the same features after the update
tests.expected_result: Key features are accessible from the same location or a clear in-app message explains any changes.

tests.scenario: No Unexplained Navigation Changes on First Post-Update Launch
steps: Open the Headspace application for the first time after an update
Navigate through the main sections
Check whether previously known features are missing or relocated without explanation
tests.expected_result: All major features are present and either unchanged in location or accompanied by an explanation.

steps: Open the Headspace application with an active subscription
Navigate to account settings
Access subscription management and select cancel
tests.expected_result: The cancellation flow completes successfully and the user receives confirmation.

steps: Open the Headspace application
Navigate to account settings and open subscription management
Review the subscription details screen
tests.expected_result: The next renewal date and billing amount are displayed before the user initiates cancellation.

tests.scenario: Customer Support Contact Option Is Visible
steps: Open the Headspace application
Navigate to the help or support section
Locate a way to contact customer support
tests.expected_result: At least one contact option such as a form, email, or chat is accessible from the support section.

steps: Open the Headspace application
Navigate to account or subscription settings
Locate a link or button to contact support regarding billing
tests.expected_result: A support contact option is available directly from the subscription or billing settings screen.
